web.markdown:
![](https://assets.clickfunnels.com/images/closemodal.png)

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/28/aafa3460514291b1804cfce8f98a40/FH-Divider-Stars.png)

Use My “Better-Than-TV” Emails To Revive Your List And Increase Sales

Unlimited Story-Driven Emails At Your Fingertips

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/fd/8e5aabc7c74c7297c3ee114b500722/Story-Sales-Machine-Product-Bundle-920x518-no-bg-b.png)

[GET THE STORY SALES MACHINE - JUST $37 USD](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/get-it-now)

This digital course + email template pack shows you how to create your Story Sales Machine and start using the power of story in your business. You’ll get email-by-email breakdowns, dozens of examples, templates, a 10-email welcome sequence, 212 subject lines, 141 story idea starters, and much more.

Use the Story Sales Machine to write story-based emails in minutes. Plan out and write entire email sequences in the time it currently takes you to write just one email!

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/9e/e71a52df3d4a9fb7cecf43224025a9/Bill.png)

_Hey. I’m Bill…_

_I help ENTREPRENEURS, coaches, and consultants use story to sell more._

millions made for clients. 15+ years of data. my very best emails, yours to use.

Hey,

I’m Bill. I’ve been writing story-based emails and email sequences since 2005 (that’s an eon in internet years).

My emails have sold millions in digital and physical products, coaching programs, and more in just about every niche.

My approach over the years has been simple:

People love stories, therefore: use stories to communicate and sell.

Trouble is, **without a clear plan it’s difficult to come up with story ideas, map out how to use those ideas, and write them in a way that gets subscribers to act.**

So, what I created is a simple, fill-in-the-blank system for writing countless story-based emails that work.

I call it the “Story Sales Machine” because all you have to do is plug-in the details about your offer, your audience, their objections, and more…

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/28/aafa3460514291b1804cfce8f98a40/FH-Divider-Stars.png)

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/58/9d815079bd4062bcdf6dea45824fda/Nicholas-Muema.png)

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/28/aafa3460514291b1804cfce8f98a40/FH-Divider-Stars.png)

## _“Almost single handedly, Bill Mueller took my annual business revenue from **$153K to $1MM with a single email strategy** executed over the course of **one week**, and then maintained that level of sales with his copywriting genius and an evergreen strategy that still **works to this day, nearly on autopilot.** He also created **$264,849.00** of ‘found’ revenue for us with a direct mail campaign we never even knew existed. Bill's knowledge of internet marketing and his continual ideas for growing businesses has been a huge boon to me and my companies. **I recommend you use Bill without question.**”_-Tim Gilberg, CEO of Guitar Jamz, San Elijo, CA

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/28/aafa3460514291b1804cfce8f98a40/FH-Divider-Stars.png)

_HEY. I’M BILL…_

_I HELP ENTREPRENEURS, COACHES, AND CONSULTANTS USE STORY TO SELL MORE._

MILLIONS MADE FOR CLIENTS. 15+ YEARS OF DATA. MY VERY BEST EMAILS, YOURS TO USE.

Hey,

I’m Bill. I’ve been writing story-based emails and email sequences since 2005 (that’s an eon in internet years).

My emails have sold millions in digital and physical products, coaching programs, and more in just about every niche.

My approach over the years has been simple:

People love stories, therefore: use stories to communicate and sell.

Trouble is, **without a clear plan it’s difficult to come up with story ideas, map out how to use those ideas, and write them in a way that gets subscribers to act.**

So, what I created is a simple, fill-in-the-blank system for writing countless story-based emails that work.

I call it the “Story Sales Machine” because all you have to do is plug-in the details about your offer, your audience, their objections, and more…

Higher LTV for Every Subscriber

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/3e/e20f88686f43659ca86c347f681c61/18-Mail.png)

Get the 8-Step Story Sales Machine and create a new welcome sequence for your offer. Set up an A/B test today or tomorrow and **watch all of your KPIs climb thanks to the power of story**, connecting with your audience and driving action.

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/61/5e0b54bc6248bab6aadcf144450803/email-sequence.png)

## _**This is about MORE than email.**_

The Story Sales Machine doesn’t stop with the emails you’re about to write.

Use the stories you’ll develop to give prospects more compelling reasons to take action on social media ads, on your blog posts, in your videos, and more.

Use the strategies you’re about to discover and apply the power of story to all of your sales messaging so you can better connect with and answer the objections of your audience.

## **Use Story to Boost Conversions on Every Platform with Every Post, Ad, or Page**

As you build your Story Sales Machine, you’ll discover how to develop **unique mechanisms** behind the promises you make and the solutions you provide. These will help your offers stand out, no matter how crowded the market is.

You’ll see how to generate stronger “big ideas” that help prospects immediately understand why your offer is for them (and why they need it!).

And you’ll answer more objections future buyers have using a framework that shows them – and really helps them feel – exactly how you can help.

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/42/8d526c9b984a8293135d8881492e1c/FH-Divider.png)

# **30 Minute Strategy Session**

## _“I just got off my 30-minute call with Bill, and **what he did in 30 minutes with me on that phone call beat the pants of a 12 chapter book!** Thank you, Bill!” -Peter T._

![](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/hosted/images/62/5cda32e24e4a66a6bc7af130d9dd83/FH-Stars.png)

Let’s Meet 1-on-1 and Talk About Story-Based Emails & Sequences

For a limited time, I’m offering 1-on-1 strategy sessions so we can meet for a chat and talk about how to implement The Story Sales Machine in your business.

[![Full Width Featured Image With Sidebar](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/b2be2fcb48971091dcd5998a572f81d0cb487a153bdce335975ecdc549b3ba04?s=256&d=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.monicabadiu.com%2Fwp-content%2Fplugins%2Fthrive-visual-editor%2Feditor%2Fcss%2Fimages%2Fauthor_image.png&r=g)](https://www.monicabadiu.com/author/monicabadiu-consultantgmail-com)

Monica Badiu, Email Copywriter & Copy Coach

## [An honest review: The best email marketing course of 2023 is the most affordable I’ve ever paid for](https://www.monicabadiu.com/2024/01/an-honest-review-the-best-email-marketing-course-of-2023-is-the-most-affordable-ive-ever-paid-for/\# "An honest review: The best email marketing course of 2023 is the most affordable I’ve ever paid for")

Share0

Tweet0

I’ve been receiving this question a lot lately:

_“What is a good course on email marketing for beginners?”_

So, if that sounds like you, today I want to introduce you to the best, most affordable, email marketing course I paid for in 2023.

Do You Know About

These 5 Revenue Levers?!

* * *

This free email series introduces you to 5 sales boosters used by course creators who consistently hit 6 and 7 figures — without burning their list or launching nonstop.

Before I reveal the name, here’s a disclaimer:

- I am not an affiliate of this email marketing course
- I am sure there are other email marketing courses out there that are better
- I find it’s a pretty good value for the $37
- It’s great for beginners (so if you’re an advanced email marketing copywriter, you might not see it as good)
- It’s one of those online courses that teach the WHY rather than the what (something I love)
- It teaches something I’ve been sharing with my coaching students and doing when I write email campaigns, so I can stand by the process and the reason behind this email marketing strategy

In September 2023, I invested in 2 different email marketing courses. One was $37. The other one was $997. One I bought through an affiliate, and it was because of brand recognition and social proof (not testimonials or case studies). The other one I bought because of problem/need recognition. One I regret buying.

The other one I’ll add to my **toolkit of email marketing essentials for beginners.**

### **Introducing: The Story Sales Machine a course on email marketing by Bill Mueller (only $37)**

I found this course through an ad on my Facebook newsfeed. It didn’t just randomly get there. Over the summer, I started working with a new client, a course creator with a powerful personal brand. I didn’t have much experience with personal brands, so I wanted to update my email marketing skills. And the best way to improve email campaigns for a personal brand is also the most difficult one.

It’s storytelling.

The only problem with personal brands is that their stories live inside their mind. It’s not the stories you can tell about a product, a student, or the audience. But that’s a story for another blog post.

So, through the magical powers of algorithms and targeting, this ad reached me at the right time. It was exactly what I was looking for. I clicked purchase and was pleasantly surprised to discover that $37 was a steal.

### **What’s inside?**

- The main training part is a 2hrs long webinar that lists tactics, processes and examples of sales emails using stories.
- I got a few bonuses with it, like a case study breakdown, a collection of Mueller’s best performing emails and two more.
- There’s no email marketing certification with this course btw. If you’re looking for a course that offers a digital marketing certification I recommend Digital Marketer.

### So, why do I recommend it?

- It’s a steal for the price (only $37, should be at least $370)
- It takes a similar approach to mine when it comes to writing and strategizing email marketing campaigns. It’s the focus on delivering value, nurturing and educating rather than pressuring subscribers into taking action because of a discount.
- It does teach tactics and processes, but it focuses a lot on understanding the WHY behind using email marketing in your digital marketing strategy, which I find to be very important. Many people send email campaigns because they think that’s what they need to do, but because they do it without a strategic approach, the results aren’t what they expect.
- **It’s a quick, comprehensive email marketing course.** About 2hrs of video training and an additional 2-3 hours going through the bonuses.
- While it does a good job of teaching a comprehensive email strategy, it’s not packed with advanced email marketing strategies, which makes it **a great choice for beginners or intermediate people** who are looking to develop their email marketing skills.
- That being said, as an email copywriter myself I love seeing **behind the scenes of successful email marketing campaigns** and understanding the thought process that goes behind choosing a specific story or tackling a specific objection.
- It teaches about **using email marketing to tackle your prospects’ objections** in a tactful but direct way. It’s one of the things I prioritize as an email marketing specialist when I consult course creators or write sales emails, and I loved how detailed Mueller’s process is for uncovering and tackling sales objections in emails.
- If you’re a beginner, this course also teaches you **when and how to use your story-based emails**(automations, daily updates, individual campaigns etc), so if it’s email marketing basics you’re interested in I think you’ll find this email marketing training pretty good.
- If you’re interested in contact management, deliverability, automations aka the technical elements of email marketing, you might want to search for other courses. This training only teaches you how to find good stories for your marketing emails. If you’re a copywriter, you’ll love it.

### What are the best email marketing courses?

Go to Google and type “best email marketing course for beginners,” and you’ll find so many options. It’s overwhelming to choose just one and know 100% it’s the right one for you.

My advice is to think about what you want to learn and what you need it for.

For instance, if you’re just **wondering if email marketing is something that could be of interest** for your brand, you can try free email marketing courses or a beginner training from Skillshare or Udemy. Most email marketing platforms have their own learning areas, so you can try that as well.

**If you’re after an email marketing certification**, then I recommend Digital Marketer’s Email Marketing Mastery. You’ll get the essentials of email marketing – everything from strategy, to building an email list, setting up a marketing automation, segmentation, copywriting etc. It’s a really good email marketing essentials course and Digital Marketer is a known by business owners as an authority.

**If you’re a copywriter and want to improve your writing or email strategy skills** and get a certification to showcase, I recommend AWAI’s The Ultimate Email Copywriting Mentorship & Certification, and everything Copyhackers’ have on email marketing.

**If you’re an online course creator,** I suggest you learn email marketing from someone who has spent a lot of time testing and refining what works for your industry and type of audience. I like Copyhacker’s Seven Figure Emails course or 10x Launches to be one of the best email marketing courses for copywriters who work with course creators.

**If you’re in ecommerce,** then I suggest you learn from an email marketing specialist who’s has a lot of experience in this area. Chris Orzechowski is my go-to copywriter in this area.

**If you’re an affiliate or you have an authority website** and want to add email marketing to your marketing channels, then learn from someone who has done it. Matt Diggity’s The Affiliate Lab is geared towards this niche.

**If you’re in b2b**, marketing emails are different to courses or selling product. Meaning it’s better to learn the strategies for your industry from someone who has done it.

If you’re looking for help with learning how to use specific email marketing tools, reach out to the platform. They will probably have their own courses.

### Regardless of what some people are saying, email marketing is here to stay.

So, even if you’re not considering becoming an email marketing copywriter or specialist, knowing how this channel works should be part of your **basic digital marketing skills.**

There are plenty of options to choose from when it comes to email marketing courses. Start with free email marketing courses if you don’t feel like investing in a paid course or you’re not looking for an email marketing certification.

**Let me know in the comments: what email marketing courses have you tried?**

##### About the Author

Monica Badiu is an email revenue strategist and conversion copywriter who helps course creators turn their email lists into reliable revenue systems.

With over 17 years of marketing experience and more than 25,000 hours spent studying and practicing customer-centric email marketing, she specializes in diagnosing the gaps that prevent email from performing at its full potential. Her strategies have helped course creators generate over $3 million in revenue, and her work focuses on building thoughtful email systems that drive sales while strengthening genuine relationships with audiences.

58 Email Storytelling Insights (feat. Bill Mueller)

15Likes

456Views

2023May 14

Bill Mueller is an email copywriter with a passion for storytelling, and the founder of a business called The Story Sales Machine. I'm delighted that Bill agreed to come on the Story Copywriter Podcast to share his expertise and compare notes!

Listen in now to learn:



Why email offers the highest ROI for storytelling How to strike the right balance between automated and broadcast emails How to repurpose old content How to make your writing entertaining - and whether to use humour Whether your writing should always be 'on topic' How long your emails should be - and the trade-off between length and frequency Where to find inspiration for your stories Why images are under-used in email Why you'll ALWAYS regret not journaling How to hook the reader into your email Tips to keep people reading Whether to include a call to action in every email Bill's recommended storytelling books

Links:

Bill's website: storysalesmachine.com



Books mentioned:



Winning the Story Wars: Why Those Who Tell - and Live - the Best Stories Will Rule the Future (Jonah Sachs) Storyworthy (Matthew Dicks) Story (Robert McKee) - see also my book review…...more

[Skip to content](https://www.listbuildinglifestyleshow.com/bill-mueller-email-storyselling-secrets/#primary)

![](https://www.listbuildinglifestyleshow.com/wp-content/themes/lbl-theme/assets/images/date-icon.svg)

12 September

# Email Story Sales Machine

[![✉️](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/2709.svg) Email Marketing](https://www.listbuildinglifestyleshow.com/email-marketing/), [![✍️](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/270d.svg) Copywriting](https://www.listbuildinglifestyleshow.com/copywriting/), [Podcast](https://www.listbuildinglifestyleshow.com/podcast/)

Email Story Sales Machine - List Building Lifestyle With Igor Kheifets \| Spotify

[Play on Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/episode/2g2fd6gGNv9M4i1zm8QxV3?go=1&sp_cid=66ba99897f9280b9282520baf26a28cb&utm_source=embed_player_p&utm_medium=desktop "Play on Spotify")

# [Email Story Sales Machine](https://open.spotify.com/episode/2g2fd6gGNv9M4i1zm8QxV3?go=1&sp_cid=66ba99897f9280b9282520baf26a28cb&utm_source=embed_player_p&utm_medium=desktop)

PreviewE

## Sep 29· [List Building Lifestyle With Igor Kheifets](https://open.spotify.com/show/1u9zRjjPLFCvJBA7ssqZcj?go=1&sp_cid=66ba99897f9280b9282520baf26a28cb&utm_source=embed_player_p&utm_medium=desktop)

Save on Spotify

- [Play on Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/episode/2g2fd6gGNv9M4i1zm8QxV3?go=1&sp_cid=66ba99897f9280b9282520baf26a28cb&utm_source=embed_player_p&utm_medium=desktop)
- Follow on Spotify
- Copy link

[Privacy Policy](https://www.spotify.com/legal/privacy-policy/)· [Terms & Conditions](https://www.spotify.com/legal)

The brain is wired to resist change and marketing. But it can’t resist a story. We’re wired for story and any marketer would be foolish not to leverage storytelling in their emails. But is email storytelling any different than just telling stories? Yes it is. Listen to this episode to find out how.

**Guest: Bill Mueller** is the founder of Story Sales Machine. He’s been writing story-based email sequences. His approach is simple: people love stories, therefore: use stories to communicate and sell.

**\[00:50\]** The Podcast is about how storytelling and emails can be used, with Bill Mueller, creator, and founder of the Story Sales Machine

**How did the idea come to be, about putting together this program of selling stories?**

**\[02:31\] Bill shares his experience about how it all started:**

- Well, I had been writing for clients for many years, and even partnered with a friend of mine, with how-to-produce that we combined into a business for years. And so just over the years, and writing sales pages and email campaigns. But there were a couple of occasions where I would fold in a story from one of my clients. And just because it was too good of a story not to tell. And the results we got, especially from that first client I had, who was selling a product for teachers, we got so many replies, and we got so many sales. And engagement just completely changed everything in this, I thought it was just kind of a one-off fluke. But whenever I had an opportunity to try it again, I noticed that it just seemed to work well.

- Marketing back in the 70s and storytelling was not so much of a thing, they thought you had to keep things short

**\[04:13\] How email storytelling is different from storytelling in general:**

- There’s a misconception about storytelling in an email that people think that you have to take the reader through the whole hero’s journey and all but that’s not true.

- It’s different from storytelling in a novel, which requires taking the reader through that whole hero journey, getting into twists, and getting it all resolved in the end.

- But with email storytelling, we don’t want things to be resolved, some tension should be there. We want people to take action.

**\[05:45\] Talking about the misconceptions that need to get into the picture:**

- Storytelling emails scare people because they think it’s like writing a novel with twists and complicated characters, things to draw a reader in. That’s just not true.

**\[06:51\] People think they don’t have any story to tell as they have ordinary lives:**

- The point here is that they don’t realize that other people can relate to their ordinary stories and not those of heroes that have bigger-than-life epics.

**\[08:35\] Sometimes those mundane, simple, and boring stories need to be told as they are relatable:**

- The best thing is you can collect different people’s stories. There are so many great stories that make such good points and teach great lessons. Give credits where they are due. They can be repurposed in emails obviously but can be made something different too.

- Reddit is one of the most famous places to go and get great stories. Those are so relatable and interesting, without the names and locations, but the details provided the actual stories. But the emotional impact of that priming for the next line in your email is insane.

- Another place for stories is Quora, it’s a question-and-answer site. People ask the strangest and most bizarre questions there but there is always someone to answer, people have stories to tell no matter what. They’re just everywhere you look.

- You just have to look right, it’s kind of like triggering that part of our brain that start noticing things like when you think of a person in the ring, or when you’re buying a new car, and all of a sudden you see that car everywhere. Once you kind of set the intention in your mind, to look for stories, these stories almost jumped at you.

- There’s nothing more exciting to me than sitting down over coffee and just listening to a great life story. Sometimes you don’t take the whole story that you find, just take a bit out of that story and use that. Like you almost don’t always have to tell the entire story from scratch, but just have part of it.

**\[15:11\] Bill’s way of mentioning his routine moments to have his own stories:**

- So at the end of the day, I just take five minutes, and I go, Okay, what 1 2 3 stories happen today, just moments, and I just write one or two lines about you don’t tell the whole story. Because if you just write a line or two, you’ll remember the rest of it. And after some time, you will have thousands of stories on the go.

- pretty much everything can be transferred into that format using stories of animals and things that just don’t exist.

- Every human being on Earth is trained to consume stories and loves them, but most people dismiss it as common knowledge, and no one is trained to do storytelling, only if we allow our brains to see things that way.

**\[18:28\] Another technique to use while email storytelling is through using an image:**

- It’s so easy to segue from an image, there’s a story always implied in an image. Now you’ve heard the saying there’s every picture’s worth 1000 words. Well, if you pick the right picture, you can draw a story out and relate it to your own story.

- The brain thinks in images like it’s easier for the brain to process an image

**\[21:06\] Bill’s tips for the writing newbie, who are trying to write in general:**

- Just stop trying to write and talk writing, do the talking on paper. You only need to be conversational and have something to say. You need to have authenticity, sincerity, and a good product to sell whatever it is you’re writing about. And just write conversationally.

**\[23:59\]**

- Learn more about Bill at [www.storysalesmachine.com](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/).

Why tell stories? Because they work. This year I’ve decided to incorporate storytelling into every part of my life: my business, my marriage and my parenting. The results speak for themselves.

Now, perhaps you could share maybe a tip or two, for the new for the newbie, the writing newbie, so to speak, that would help them ease the burden of trying to write a great story or trying to write in general. Yeah, well, I would tell them stop trying to write just talk writing. It's just talking on paper. And that brings us to another great myth, which is people feel like they need to be a writer to write emails, no, you just need to be

21:30

conversational and have something to say. And one of the best email writers I know is a gentleman who sells an E commerce product. And he just speaks from the heart. And he literally just dictates his emails into a little dictaphone that he has, and then he just has an editor or his VA cleaned it up. And then he does a final look through. But really writing is just talking on paper. Nobody should be intimidated by it. Emails, a very forgiving format. You're not writing a book, it's even less formal than a blog post. You don't even have to write complete sentences here. And there. You just need to have authenticity, sincerity, a good product to sell whatever it is you're writing about. And just write conversationally.

22:16

Yeah, I think it's a great tip. And there's a great software called

22:22

otter.ai That transcribes what you're saying in real time, whether from your mobile device or your computer. So you don't even have to hire a VA to transcribe your stuff. Now, it's done through, you know, AI. And, you know, my mentor, Mike, my copywriting mentor, once told me that he wished people wrote emails the same way they write their Facebook posts, because it seems like on Facebook, people don't, don't feel the need to filter themselves at all. They don't find it to be formal in any way that they just kind of get on Facebook and start typing. So he said, if more people wrote emails like that, would see a lot more, a lot more great email copy than that. Now, unfortunately, we're running out of time, and we have to stick the format. But I know you have a lot more to share. And not to mention, you've got these amazing templates that people can use to tell stories as well as ready to go stories that are already formatted and just copied, pasted below and ready to go for different purposes, products and services. So where can we find out more about what you do and about the story Sales Machine program that you've got? Yeah, it's, it's that exact name [www.storysalesmachine.com](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/). And I, what I teach in that program is how to tell a story based emails in an easy and conversational way. Like you said, I have, if people choose, they can get a packet of ready to go stories, they can copy and paste. I also have templates where you can customize and put your own story in there, and details of whatever it is you sell. And

23:59

that's where they can find that [www.storysalesmachine.com](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/).

24:04

Alright, guys, so you heard the man, its [www.storysalesmachine.com](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/). I highly, highly recommend you go and grab it, I actually own it. I use the stories in those templates. Sometimes, if I'm lazy or short on time, I'll literally copy and paste. One of my favorite stories out of that swipe file give you a sneak peek is the one about the Nissan GTR. It's about a guy who goes on to like a car, park or whatever or a lot and basically buys a really cheap, beat down Nissan. And somebody questions them as to why they've done it and it turns out to be like a collectible card that no one noticed. Then basically that is worth a lot of money.

24:53

And it's a story about how some gems are just out there and no one noticed

25:00

is, and I think it's a great, great, great point. It's just an amazing like, when I read that story in the swipe file, I was like, almost like set back in my chair, and was taken aback at the quality and the caliber of the story and just how universally applicable it is to whatever that I wanted to promote. So, guys, this is the kind of quality that that that bill has in that program. I sincerely recommend you go and check it out. Go to [www.storysalesmachine.com](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/) Right now, or if you're driving, do it when you're not driving. Or if you're in the shower, just get out of the shower immediately and go to [www.storysalesmachine.com](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/) Okay, so that's about it for today. Bill, thank you so much for taking the time to read with me about email storytelling and story selling. I can't wait for our members and listeners to go and grab your program. And until next time, we'll chat. Have a good one. Thanks, Igor.

26:04

Thank you for listening to the list building lifestyle. Get access to the previous episodes transcript of today's show, as well as other exclusive content at [www.listbuildinglifestyleshow.com](https://www.listbuildinglifestyleshow.com/). Also remember to claim your free copy of my bestselling book at [www.igorsbook.com](https://www.igorsbook.com/). It explains how I made millions with list building starting from scratch. # Bill Mueller – Story Sales Machine Black Friday Bundle

The Bill Mueller – Story Sales Machine Black Friday Bundle offers powerful sales techniques that leverage storytelling to captivate and convert leads effectively.

## What you'll learn in Bill Mueller – Story Sales Machine Black Friday Bundle

- 1\. Understand the psychology behind storytelling in sales.
- 2\. Create compelling narratives that engage your audience.
- 3\. Utilize emotional triggers to drive conversions.
- 4\. Develop effective sales scripts using storytelling techniques.
- 5\. Measure the impact of stories in your sales process.
- 6\. Implement storytelling strategies across various sales channels.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201327%20231'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Course Description

## **Bill Mueller – Story Sales Machine Black Friday Bundle**

![Bill Mueller – Story Sales Machine Black Friday Bundle](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20603%20179'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Welcome to the **[Story Sales Machine Black Friday Bundle course](https://udcourse.com/product/bill-mueller-story-sales-machine-black-friday-bundle/)** by Bill Mueller, a comprehensive course designed to revolutionize your email marketing strategy.

This unique program combines the art of storytelling with the efficiency of sales, ensuring that your emails captivate your audience and drive significant sales. Whether you’re a seasoned marketer or starting out, this course is tailored to turn your email list into a consistent profit-generating asset.

## **What the Course Offers:**

**The Story Launch Workshop:**

- **Done-With-You Coaching:** Engage in a hands-on training program to craft and send high-impact emails.
- **Lifetime Access to Recordings:** Revisit the lessons anytime for continuous learning and improvement.
- **Worksheets and Assignments:** Apply your learning with practical exercises and receive personalized feedback.
- **Group Q&A Sessions:** Clarify your doubts and gain deeper insights with special Q&A calls.

**The Endless Email Flywheel:**

- **Recorded Sessions and Q&A:** Access four detailed sessions plus a bonus Q&A for comprehensive learning.
- **Worksheets and Prompts:** Overcome writer’s block with tailored worksheets and creative prompts.
- **Step-by-Step Workflow:** Learn Bill Mueller’s proven process for creating engaging and sales-driven emails.
- **Audience Understanding:** Master techniques to deeply connect with your audience’s needs and desires.

**Email Story Wizard Workshop:**

- **ChatGPT Training:** Discover how to use ChatGPT as a personal assistant for endless content ideas.
- **AI-Driven Email Creation:** Learn to let AI draft compelling emails, saving time without sacrificing quality.
- **Editing for Unique Voice:** Refine AI-generated drafts to perfectly match your brand’s voice and style.
- **AI Planning for Email Sequences:** Utilize AI to plan and execute email sequences efficiently.

### **Course Structure Highlights:**

- **Practical Working Sessions:** Experience real-time email creation and editing with four interactive sessions.
- **Lectures and Implementation:** Gain valuable insights from lectures and see them implemented live.
- **Feedback and Q&A:** Benefit from each workshop’s direct feedback and comprehensive Q&A sessions.
- **Lifetime Access to Resources:** Get unlimited access to all workshop recordings, handouts, transcripts, and samples.
- **Bonus Evergreen Email Samples:** Enhance your email campaigns with 38 evergreen email samples.

**Why Choose the Story Sales Machine [Black Friday Bundle](https://udcourse.com/product/ezra-firestone-smart-ecommerce/ "Ezra Firestone – Smart Ecommerce")?**

Bill Mueller’s course is not just about learning email marketing; it’s about mastering a skill that combines storytelling with sales techniques to create emails that are read and acted upon.

This course is designed to provide you with the tools, strategies, and confidence to transform your email list into a reliable source of income. With a focus on practical application, this course ensures that you learn theories and apply them to see actual results.

The Story Sales Machine, Black Friday Bundle, is essential for anyone looking to enhance their email marketing strategy. With its comprehensive curriculum, expert guidance, and many resources, this course is your ticket to mastering the art of email storytelling and turning your list into a consistent revenue stream.

Join now and start transforming your email marketing into a powerful sales machine

More Info

The Curious Hero Podcast

Building an Email Story Sales Machine with Bill Mueller

Jun 15, 2021Episode 35

Tom Polifka


In this episode we dive into using story telling in emails can create a sales machine for any online business. For the last 20 years Bill has been using his copywriting skills to help coaches, consultants, and other businesses sell more through story telling. Specifically we talk about using [email marketing](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/story-sales-machine) combined with being interesting to help sell more products.

Bill said "everybody is so obsessed with subject lines and they are important because that's the only way they're going to open, right. But if you consistently write entertaining, interesting emails, you're going to open it because the person is sending it. Not what's in the subject line." Basically, you, you don't need to be a master storyteller. You just need to be someone who's kind of interesting and different.

[![Buzzsprout](https://assets.buzzsprout.com/assets/wave_player/poweredby-buzzsprout-302f98fa361c672baf21e30267804cd9e7aa49223b03b35988eaa851712705b9.svg)](https://www.buzzsprout.com/)

Do you look forward to receiving emails from a business? For most people their email inbox is filled up each with hundreds of emails shouting for attention and trying to get you to do something like buy their product.

Business owners know that email is a proven marketing method with the highest return on investment of any online medium. For this reason they know the importance of getting subscribers to open their emails and click on the call-to-action. There is one big problem though.

**People don't want to open just any email.**

My guest on episode 35 of The Curious Hero Podcast will share how to get subscribers excited to receive your emails and turn you into the only email they are excited to open. Bill Mueller joins me in this episode to discuss how to create an email story sales machine.

Bill is a former journalist who got into internet marketing 20 years ago.  He now helps entrepreneurs, coaches, and consultants sell more and sell better with story-based marketing.

> "Everybody's everybody is so obsessed with subject lines and they are important because that's the only way they're going to open it, right. But if you consistently write entertaining, interesting emails, you're going to open it because the person is sending it. Not what's in the subject line because even if the subject line is maybe meh, you're like, well, this guy can turn into something pretty good." - Bill Mueller

After I purchased his Story Sales Machine training I instantly got excited for each email he would send. The emails are not super fancy templates, they're authentic and interesting.

One email that caught my attention was the story of The Fosbury Flop.

‍

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6045223631ca2e22db179a97/60c8c514b17e5b8b9f37382c_Bill%20Mueller%20Fosbury%20Flop%20Email.jpg)

‍

This email was so intriguing and captured my attention the entire time that I forgot about what Bill was selling. It wasn't until he made a transition at the end of the story into what he wanted me to do next that I saw the power in these type of emails.

I got so excited to learn more about how to incorporate story into emails that I invited Bill onto the podcast to share with everyone.

If you want to see some examples of these emails be sure to listen to the episode where Bill gives you a way to get free access to them or you could just buy his [Story Sales Machine](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/story-sales-machine) workshop.

I know you will get a lot from this episode and I would love to hear what you think after getting his emails.

### Keep Listening

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/drop-dead-copy-logo-white.png)

# ⚠️

**Attention Copywriters and Marketers:** The AI wave is here. Ride it or get wiped out.

# 8 Top Copywriters Reveal Their Best AI Secrets 🤖

## I Asked 8 Top Copywriters for Their Best AI Copywriting Secrets. Here’s What They Revealed…

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/bill-mueller.jpg)

**Bill Mueller**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/david-deutsch.jpg)

**David Deutsch**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/john-mcintyre-profile.png)

**John McIntyre**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/Kim-Schwalm.jpeg)

**Kim Schwalm**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/lorrie-morgan.jpg)

**Lorrie Morgan**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/Lukas-Resheske-bigger.jpg)

**Lukas Fisher**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/rob-marsh-copywriter-club.jpg)

**Rob Marsh**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/shiv-shetti.jpg)

**Shiv Shetti**

## 👇 Here’s What You Get:

(experts listed in alphabetical order)

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/bill-mueller.jpg)

###### Bill Mueller

### **How to Use AI to Find Stories, Repurpose Content & Write Faster**

Bill Mueller, a veteran direct response copywriter with over 20 years of experience, once resisted AI – until he realized it could help him create high-quality, engaging copy faster than ever before.

In this session, he pulls back the curtain on how he uses AI to repurpose winning emails, generate fresh stories, and streamline the creative process without sacrificing authenticity.

If you’ve ever felt the crushing weight of coming up with endless new ideas, this interview will show you how to get AI to do the heavy lifting – while you take the credit.

**In Bill’s session, you’ll discover:**

**✅ The “Invisible Rewrites” Hack** – Discover how Bill effortlessly reuses old emails with a fresh spin so effectively that even his most loyal subscribers don’t recognize the rerun

**✅ The AI Director’s Chair** – Why using AI is like having a personal writing assistant that takes your rough ideas and polishes them into gold – without making your copy sound like a robot wrote it

**✅ The Weird Story Generator** – How Bill gets AI to unearth bizarre, engaging stories (like grown men obsessed with vacuum cleaners) to hook readers instantly and make marketing messages unforgettable

**✅ The Fill-in-the-Blank Trick** – A simple AI prompt that completes half-finished sentences with punchy, witty, and perfectly on-brand phrasing – so you never stare at a blinking cursor again

**✅ The “Stealth Persuasion” Formula** – How AI helps craft emails that feel personal, natural, and engaging – without the usual time-consuming mental gymnastics that go into great storytelling

**What’s included:**

✅ 41-minute video with subtitles

✅ Transcript

**What people are saying:**

I’ve used Bill as a copywriter for years. He’s the best. And expensive. Great sales writing is an art that Bill has mastered. Getting Bill’s stuff is a steal.

**Dana Robinson**

### VALUE: $99

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/david-deutsch.jpg)

###### David Deutsch

### **The AI Trap: 10 Big Mistakes That Could Be Making Your Copy Worse Instead of Better**

David Deutsch, a world-renowned direct response copywriter, has seen every major shift in marketing – from typewriters to AI – and knows exactly what separates winning copy from forgettable fluff.

In this session, he exposes the biggest AI mistakes copywriters make, including why relying too much on AI kills your creativity and how to inject the human touch that makes your writing stand out.

If you want to use AI without losing your edge, David’s insights will show you how to turn AI into a powerful tool instead of a crutch.

**In David’s session, you’ll discover:**

✅ **The AI Trap That’s Making Your Copy Worse** – Why most AI-generated copy sounds off – and the simple tweak that makes it feel human, persuasive, and impossible to ignore

✅ **The “Evil Genie” Prompting Hack** – AI wants to misunderstand you – unless you use this one trick to force it to follow your instructions exactly the way you want

✅ **How to Make AI Your Creative Wingman** – The secret to using AI as a brainstorming partner without letting it weaken your thinking skills (this is where most copywriters go wrong)

✅ **The 3-Step Formula for AI-Generated Gold** – Why most people stop at step one – and how adding these two extra steps transforms AI’s bland, generic outputs into powerful, high-converting copy

✅ **The Invisible AI Fingerprints That Are Killing Your Sales** – The telltale signs of AI-written copy that make readers instantly tune out – and how to remove them before they ruin your marketing

**What’s included:**

✅ 42-minute video with subtitles

✅ Transcript

**What people are saying:**

David Deutsch is one of only a handful of A+ copywriters in the country. His copy is always a work of art… every headline, sentence and word is where it is for a reason… he just ‘gets it’ like so few have ever gotten it. He can write it, tell you why he wrote it that way, and teach you how to write it (if you have the curiosity and the attention to detail he has). And then he can do it all over again and beat what he wrote in the first place. Now that’s an A+ copywriter!

**Brian Kurtz**· Executive VP, Boardroom Inc.

### VALUE: $99

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/john-mcintyre-profile.png)

###### John McIntyre

### **From Blank Page to 7-Email Sequence: The AI-Powered Email Writing Blueprint**

John McIntyre, the founder of Drop Dead Copy and the creator of AI Copywriting Secrets (Volume 1), has spent years mastering email marketing, and now he’s using AI to build entire email sequences faster than ever before.

In this session, he walks you through his exact process – how he brainstorms, iterates, and integrates AI to craft high-converting, story-driven emails that hook readers and drive sales.

Whether you’re writing a welcome sequence, a sales campaign, or just a daily email, John reveals how AI can amplify your creativity without replacing your expertise.

**In John’s session, you’ll discover:**

✅ **The “AI Copywriting Assistant” Method** – How John treats ChatGPT like a junior copywriter, using voice messages to brainstorm, refine ideas, and generate entire sequences without losing his signature style

✅ **The Unbreakable Connection Formula**– How to craft emails that don’t just sell, but bond you to your readers – building trust and authority that makes them eager to hear from you

✅ **The Reddit Copy Hack** – How to get real, raw customer emotions from Reddit (or Amazon reviews) and inject them into your AI-powered copy for instant believability and persuasion

✅ **The Open Loop Email Trick** – Why most AI-generated emails are flat and forgettable – and how John uses soap opera storytelling techniques to keep readers hooked until the very last email

✅ **From Blank Page to Killer Sequence in 30 Minutes** – How John uses AI to go from zero to a polished 7-email sequence, cutting brainstorming time in half while keeping his emails sharp, engaging, and personal

**What’s included:**

✅ 51-minute video with subtitles

✅ Transcript

**What people are saying:**

John McIntyre easily nets me a few hundred thousand dollars a year. That’s more money than some of my friends make even though they have 10x more leads.

**Matthew Pollard**· The Rapid Growth Guy

### VALUE: $99

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/Kim-Schwalm.jpeg)

###### Kim Schwalm

### **AI Research Secrets: When to Trust It – And When It’s Leading You Astray**

Kim Krause Schwalm, an A-list copywriter with over 30 years of experience, reveals why research is the real secret to copy that converts – and how AI can be a powerful (but dangerous) tool in the process.

In this exclusive session, she pulls back the curtain on her step-by-step research system, showing how to uncover the deepest fears, frustrations, and desires of any market to craft sales copy that feels like mind reading.

If you’ve ever wondered how to blend AI with human insight to create powerhouse marketing campaigns, this session is an absolute must-watch.

**In Kim’s session, you’ll discover:**

✅ **The $1,000,000 Copy Shortcut** – Discover the 5-step research system that’s behind Kim’s most profitable promotions (including how to make your copy practically write itself)

✅ **The Empathy Hack That AI Can’t Replace** – Why most AI-generated copy falls flat – and the one human insight trick that makes your marketing irresistible

✅ **Steal This Prism Exercise** – A mind-blowingly simple framework (originally from Clayton Makepeace) that lets you tap directly into your prospect’s raw emotions and hidden desires

✅ **The AI Research Minefield** – How to use AI for research without letting it feed you outdated, hallucinated, or weak information that destroys your copy’s credibility

✅ **The “Toilet Death” Sales Hook** – How Kim used a shocking yet scientifically backed statistic to craft one of her most powerful direct mail promotions (hint: it involves Elvis Presley and heart attacks)

**What’s included:**

✅ 35-minute video with subtitles

✅ Transcript

**What people are saying:**

One of the top copywriters on the planet.

**Ben Settle**· Email Copywriting Expert

### VALUE: $99

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/lorrie-morgan.jpg)

###### Lorrie Morgan

### **How to Make AI Write Like You (Without Sounding Like a Robot)**

Lorrie Morgan, the mastermind behind Red Hot Copy, has spent decades perfecting the art of selling to women – and now she’s using AI to do it faster, smarter, and more effectively than ever before.

In this session, she pulls back the curtain on how she trained ChatGPT to mimic her signature voice, brainstorm fresh ideas, and streamline everything from course creation to sales letters.

If you want to see how a top copywriter uses AI without losing the human touch, this is the session you can’t afford to miss.

**In Lorrie’s session, you’ll discover:**

**✅ The “AI Style File” Hack** – How Lorrie trained ChatGPT to write exactly like her – capturing her humor, sarcasm, and storytelling – so she never starts from scratch again

✅ **The Femme Factor Formula** – How AI helped her structure, outline, and refine a brand-new course from the ground up (without turning it into generic robot-speak)

✅ **The “AI vs. Human Touch” Showdown** – The surprising reason why AI still can’t replace human intuition (and why the best writers use it as a tool, not a crutch)

✅ **The Lightning-Fast Brainstorming Trick** – How Lorrie gets ChatGPT to generate names, headlines, and marketing angles in seconds – so she never wastes hours staring at a blank screen

✅ **The AI Email Factory** – How she uses ChatGPT to draft email sequences and social posts, cutting down her workload while keeping her messaging fresh and engaging

**What’s included:**

✅ 34-minute video with subtitles

✅ Transcript

**What people are saying:**

Lorrie flatters me, often, by saying I helped her launch her career… but to be fair, my part was more like simply lighting the fuse on a rocket ready to go. She came out of nowhere, and quickly became the most widely-known and respected female copywriters around — working with Dan Kennedy, Gary Halbert, Joe Polish, and other top marketers. She brings a super-savvy female perspective to copywriting, as well as showing up most of the guys who have been in the freelance gig much longer than her. As a professional, she comes with the highest recommendation possible.

**John Carlton**· A-List Copywriter

### VALUE: $99

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/Lukas-Resheske-bigger.jpg)

###### Lukas Fisher

### **How a Copywriter Used AI to Replace Copywriters (And What It Means for You)**

Lukas Fisher, a seasoned copywriter and AI consultant, has been integrating AI into his workflow since 2021 – long before most marketers realized they had to adapt.

In this session, he reveals how AI is no longer just a tool but a fundamental shift, showing exactly how he uses it to scale his copywriting, automate research, and unlock unprecedented speed and efficiency.

If you’re still treating AI like a gimmick, this interview will wake you up to the reality: adapt now, or get left behind.

**In Lukas’ session, you’ll discover:**

✅ **The AI Hiring Experiment That Changed Everything** – Lukas posted a real job for copywriters… then had AI apply for it. The shocking results proved why most copywriters are already being replaced

✅ **The “AI Memory Hack”** – How Lukas gets AI to remember his tone, projects, and past conversations – so it writes like him, thinks like him, and gets better every time he uses it

✅ **The Copywriting Skill You Must Master to Stay Relevant** – AI is getting better at writing… but there’s still one thing it sucks at. Get this skill right, and you’ll never be replaced

✅ **How to Bypass AI Limits and Unlock Unlimited Firepower** – Lukas shares his secret weapon: an AI interface that removes caps, speeds up workflow, and eliminates the biggest frustration of ChatGPT users

✅ **The “AI Workflow Pyramid”** – AI 101, 201, and 301: Lukas’s step-by-step system for turning AI from a basic assistant into a powerhouse that can 10x your output without burning you out

✅ 47-minute video

✅ Transcript

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/rob-marsh-copywriter-club.jpg)

### **The Copywriter’s AI Arsenal: Bullet Generators, Research Hacks, and Client Finding Tricks**

Rob Marsh, co-founder of The Copywriter Club, has been in the game since the ‘90s – long before AI ever touched a sales page.

In this session, he reveals how AI isn’t here to replace skilled copywriters, but rather to amplify their speed, creativity, and ability to land better clients.

From custom GPTs that generate headlines and bullets in seconds to deep research tools that uncover hidden persuasion techniques, Rob shares the AI strategies that are making smart copywriters unstoppable.

**In Rob’s session, you’ll discover:**

✅ **The Bullet Factory Hack** – How Rob built a custom AI tool that instantly churns out 100+ high-converting bullets in the style of Clayton Makepeace – saving hours of brainstorming

✅ **The Secret Client Finder** – A shockingly simple AI trick that digs up hidden, high-value clients in any niche (that Google will never show you)

✅ **The Course Reverse-Engineering Blueprint** – How Rob extracts the core teachings of a $500+ copywriting course without ever buying it – and how you can use AI to deconstruct any sales page for hidden insights

✅ **The Research Shortcut That Feels Like Cheating** – A free AI tool from Stanford that scours academic papers and psychological studies, delivering expert-level insights in minutes

✅ **The 80/20 Copywriting Machine** – Why Rob’s favorite AI tool writes 80% of a VSL, sales page, or email sequence in minutes – so all he has to do is tweak and cash the check

✅ Transcript

**What people are saying:**

Kira & Rob do an outstanding job of taking you behind-the-scenes of not just what it’s like to be a working copywriter, but critical lessons everyone needs to be able to create copy that converts.

**Maggie Patterson**· Copywriter, Podcaster, and Small Business Boss

### VALUE: $99

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/shiv-shetti.jpg)

###### Shiv Shetti

### **How to Train Like a Pro Copywriter Using AI (Without Letting It Ruin Your Skills)**

Shiv Shetti, founder of the Performance Copywriter Method (PCM), has built a thriving coaching business teaching copywriters how to land high-ticket, commission-based deals.

In this session, he unveils how he integrates AI into his workflow – not to replace human creativity but to sharpen copy, practice salesmanship, and streamline client acquisition.

If you’ve been relying on AI to do the heavy lifting for you, Shiv’s approach will show you why that’s a mistake – and how to use AI the right way to sharpen your skills, improve your copy, and get more clients.

**In Shiv’s session, you’ll discover:**

✅ **The “AI Dojo” Training Method** – Why Shiv treats AI like a sparring partner for copywriters, helping them sharpen their skills instead of letting AI do all the work (and making them lazy)

✅ **How AI Can Simulate a Real Client Brief** – A mind-blowing way to use AI to create fake client scenarios that force you to write persuasive copy under real-world constraints

✅ **The “Copywriter’s X-Ray Vision” Trick** – How to use AI to instantly find high-quality, hidden client opportunities that Google will never show you

✅ **AI as Your Personal Copy Chief** – The counterintuitive reason why Shiv never asks AI for specific writing feedback first – but instead uses a simple trick to get brutally honest critiques

✅ **The AI “Deep Research” Hack** – A little-known method for fact-checking and corroborating hooks, angles, and claims – so your copy sounds bulletproof (not generic)

✅ Transcript

**Van Chow**· Copywriter

### VALUE: $99

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ai-copywriting-bonus.webp)

###### BONUS PERK \#1

### **Learn Straight from the Pros — Right in Your Inbox**

You’ll be automatically subscribed to each expert’s email list after purchase. That way, they can personally send you their best copywriting strategies, insights, and resources – all to help you write faster and make more money.

## ✅ Included In The Bundle!

## **Here’s What This AI Copywriting Bundle Will Do For You**:

## No more…

**😭 Wondering if AI is a threat or a tool.** You can fight it, fear it, or ignore it — but the smartest copywriters are learning how to use it. AI Copywriting Secrets (Volume 1) shows you how.

**😭 Wasting hours testing AI prompts that don’t work.** You don’t need to guess. These top copywriters have already figured it out — just steal their strategies and start writing smarter.

**😭 Fear of getting replaced by AI.** The reality? AI won’t replace you — unless you refuse to adapt. AI Copywriting Secrets (Volume 1) gives you the edge you need to stay ahead.

**😭 Clients asking for AI-generated copy — and you not knowing what to do.** Whether you’re using AI or competing against it, these expert insights will keep you relevant (and profitable).

## Finally…

**😍 AI copywriting strategies straight from the pros.** No theory. No fluff. Just real-world tactics from top copywriters who actually use AI to write and sell.

**😍 A shortcut to mastering AI-assisted copy.** Learn in hours what would take months to figure out on your own — so you can start using AI the right way, right now.

**😍 Make AI your secret weapon, not your replacement.** The best copywriters aren’t scared of AI — they’re leveraging it. Now you can, too.

😍 **Command higher rates with AI-enhanced copy.** AI isn’t just about speed — it’s about precision, creativity, and results. Learn how to wield it like a pro and watch your value skyrocket.

## **How to Start Making More Money with AI Copywriting Secrets (Volume 1) in the Next 30 Days**

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ai-copywriting-step-1.webp)

![](https://www.dropdeadcopy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ai-copywriting-step-3.webp)

**Step 3: Use AI to Write Smarter & Sell More**

Whether you’re writing for yourself or clients, AI Copywriting Secrets (Volume 1) will help you sharpen your skills, boost your confidence, and increase your earning potential — without spending months figuring AI out on your own.

## **We Want Copywriters Who Are Ready to Stay Ahead of the Game**

Copywriters who know AI isn’t going away — and want to learn how to use it to their advantage.

Copywriters who believe in continuous learning and understand that staying at the top of their game means adapting, improving, and evolving.

Copywriters who follow Gary Bencivenga’s golden rule:

The smart, curious, lifelong learners.

## **AI Copywriting Secrets (Volume 1) Is One of the Most Valuable Offers You’ll See This Year**

It’s insider access to the AI secrets top copywriters are using right now — before most people even know they exist.

Most of this knowledge isn’t available for sale anywhere else.

The only other way to get this?

Pay these experts’ consulting rates.

But today, you get it all — for a fraction of the cost.

## **This Knowledge Isn’t Cheap —**  **But Today, It’s Yours for Just $197**

# Bill Mueller – The Man Behind the Curtain

#### 8 years ago ·   1:00:29

Bill Mueller - The Man Behind the Curtain (EP.05)

The Exit Plan Podcast


Bill Mueller - The Man Behind the Curtain (EP.05)

30

30


Listen using your preferred podcast platform.

[iTunes](https://itunes.apple.com/us/podcast/opt-out-life/id1361449839)

[Google](https://www.google.com/podcasts?feed=aHR0cDovL29wdG91dGxpZmUubGlic3luLmNvbS9yc3M%3D)

[Android](http://subscribeonandroid.com/optoutlife.libsyn.com/rss)

[Stitcher](https://www.stitcher.com/podcast/mathew-passy/opt-out-life)

We call this episode **“The Man Behind the Curtain”** because our guest Bill Mueller has a unique skill that is required for every business, from big corporations to independent Etsy stores, and everything in between. That skill is copywriting.

Bill hasn’t had a real job in over 15 years.  He works from home, takes long walks with his dog, and makes money consistently by selling info products and consulting as a copywriter.  But this didn’t happen for him overnight.  Bill is a trained journalist who stumbled into the world of internet marketing and info products only after helping his buddy write a book.

As Bill tells us, every decision made in our world **_to buy_** is based primarily on words.  Those words that make up an ad, a product description, a social media post or an online review. Words influence people, and words sell products. That’s really as true in 2018 as it was 50 years ago.

Bill’s words have sold millions of dollars of products over two decades. And that end goal always starts with a flashing cursor on a blank screen.

Bill’s a modest guy, but you’ll find that he’s incredibly intelligent, and passes along a wealth of knowledge about copywriting and marketing. This isn’t our typical “hanging over beers” atmosphere…partly because we forgot the beer… but you’ll want to save this one for reference in the future!

### **Highlights from Episode 5 with Bill . . .**

**On finding early success with a book and product on ADHD that he wrote with a buddy he played basketball with . . .**“ _It took about eight weeks to get his story down and all his advice, and then we combined it with PDFs and audio interviews, and eventually did videos. From a small computer in a studio apartment in La Jolla Shores, we ended up selling information products to people in 43 different countries and turned it to a full time business and never looked back.”_

**Telling us to not perceive the “experts” in online marketing as having some magical talent . . .** _“I think a big stumbling block to a lot of people that subscribe to these internet marketers’ lists, they think there must be something more complicated about it, and there’s not. Find the market first, find the demand, have a good product, learn how to copywrite a good sales page, drive the traffic to it. There’s not a complicated game, but people want to think that there’s something magical about Frank Kern or John Reese, and it’s really not the case.”_

**On the power and pervasiveness of “words” in every buying decision we make . . .** _“Isn’t it amazing? When you buy something on the internet, what are you basing your entire decision on almost aways? It’s just the words on the screen. Now, video’s great, but the great sales videos are written with a script. They have just as much structure as a written sales letter. Nobody’s winging it and then just hoping it sells. There’s a craft of those as well. But think about it. Whenever you’re cruising around looking for information, and the credibility has to be there, the trust has to be there, you’re going by the words. Whether it’s, you could be reading an Amazon review. You’re just reading words. Words on a screen. Those pixels are going to base your entire decision.”_

## Start Your "Opt Out" Now

### Grab Your Free Copy of Dana's Book

We want to help you live the “opt out life” in your own way. It all starts with the stories of people who’ve already done it.

For a limited time, we’re giving away a free copy of the “Opt Out” book. Enter your email address to claim your copy now!

web.title: 180: How to Write Persuasive Story Based Emails From Scratch
web.description: This week Bill Mueller joins us from Story Sales Machine to discuss the formula for writing story-based emails from scratch.

This week Bill Mueller joins us from [Story Sales Machine](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/story-sales-machine) to discuss the formula for writing story-based emails from scratch.

Bill’s been writing story-based emails and email sequences since 2005. His emails have sold millions in digital and physical products, coaching programs, and more in just about every niche.

![](https://persuasionbythepint.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/bill-mueller.jpg)

His approach over the years has been simple. People love stories, therefore use stories to communicate and sell.

On this episode, we’ll be discussing “how to tell more persuasive stories in your emails”. If you want to learn how to craft better stories, check our Bill’s course at [www.storysalesmachine.com](https://www.storysalesmachine.com/story-sales-machine).

web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#content)

Hey Guys, welcome to the [Story Sales Machine review](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-monetarifund-review)

If you have an online business or thinking of creating one then you should know that email marketing.

Plays an important role and is another passive income stream that you should be taking advantage of.

In order to keep your subscribers interested, you need to create things like newsletters and a series of emails.

This is where the Story Sales Machine comes in and could help you, but we have seen many of these products on the market in the past that didn’t hold up to their claims.

Is the Story Sales Machine one of those products?

If you have an online business or thinking of starting one the Story Sales Machine could be a worthy product to have in your toolbox.

Before we get started we’d just like to mention that we are not associated with Bill Mueller or the Story Sales Machine in any way.

That means that what you’ll get from us is an honest unbiased account with all the facts so that you can decide if this product is for you or not.

That said, let’s begin.

* * *

_\[Affiliate Disclosure: The**Story Sales Machine Review**has been thoroughly researched from information and testimonials that are in the public domain. This post may contain affiliate links which means we may earn a small commission, however, this won’t affect what you pay!\]_

* * *

![what is the story sales machine](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/what-is-the-story-sales-machine.jpg)

**Product:** Story Sales Machine

**Founder:** Bill Mueller

**Website:** www.storysalesmachine.com

**Product Description:** Email marketing course

**Cost to join:** $37

**Recommended:** Yes

**Summary:** Running an online business takes a lot of time and hard work because there is a lot involved.

Email marketing is sometimes neglected due to the lack of time and therefore creating email sequences and newsletters tend to be left to one side.

The Story Sales Machine is a decent course that teaches you all you would need to know about email marketing.

It might not be the best training but what do you expect for $37?

But, if you have an online business and email marketing isn’t on your list of things to do we would seriously consider it.

**Business Opportunity we think you will like:**

If you are in the early stages of contemplating building an online business you might like to take a look at the link below.

[![My number one recommended training platform for creating an online business](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/WANF)

## Story Sales Machine Review – TOC

01. [**What is the Story Sales Machine?**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a1)
02. [**Who is Bill Mueller?**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a2)
03. [**What You Get With Story Sales Machine**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a3)
04. [**Who is The Story Sales Machine For?**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a4)
05. [**Is The Story Sales Machine a Scam?**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a5)
06. [**What we Like About Story Sales Machine**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a6)
07. [**What we Don’t Like About Story Sales Machine**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a7)
08. [**The Story Sales Machine Review -Final Thoughts**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a8)
09. [**Something That We Think Might Interest You**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a9)
10. [**Story Sales Machine FAQs**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a10)
11. [**Feedback, Follow and Subscribe**](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/what-is-the-story-sales-machine#a11)

### What is The Story Sales Machine About?

The Story Sales Machine is an online digital course that teaches you the art and importance of storytelling in email marketing.

Bill Mueller is the creator and owner of the Story Sales Machine and has made millions for his clients and is offering to share his secrets with you.

The course comes with many templates and breaks down the entire email creation process and will help you create story emails in a super quick time.

The course comes with a fill-in-the-blanks system that helps you create many story bases emails that work.

Just plug in your details, such as your audience, offer, plus more information and the system will generate your emails automatically.

There is an 8-step process to help generate your story ideas and turn them into emails that your audience will love.

I don’t know about you but I get hundreds of emails and most of them I just delete so creating the right email sequence that is eye-catching has to help.

Bill Mueller is so confident that the Story Sales Machine is going to help anybody that he attaches a 365 full money-back guarantee.

There is even a 30-minute conference call with Bill himself to discuss strategies.

Seems like you are getting a lot for $37, right?

### Who is Bill Mueller?

Bill has been helping clients since 2005 to increase business revenue through his unique approach to email marketing.

Emails that we receive daily are normally pretty boring and repetitive and most people delete them without a second thought.

According to Bill, he says that people are more inclined to respond to your marketing strategy through email stories.

According to one client Bill single-handedly increased annual revenue from $153k to $1MM with one email strategy over the course of  1 week.

Bill’s reasoning behind The Story Sales Machine and why this approach is so successful is because people love storytelling.

He has obviously been involved in this type of marketing for a number of years and therefore should know his stuff.

Here’s a YouTube video interview with Bill Mueller discussing storytelling.

### What You Get With The Story Sales Machine

There is quite a lot of training that comes with the Story Sales Machine and hers is a breakdown of what you get…

- Story Sales Machine Training
- 10-step email welcome sequence
- 212 subject lines, emails and much more

Which includes…

- 2+ hours of full instructions
- 8-step story sales machine
- Examples that you can follow
- A number of email templates
- How to generate story ideas
- Better “Big ideas” for offers
- Answers to objections
- Plus so much more

There is an additional 5 bonuses that come with this offer.

- 28-day email solution – 68-page case study breakdown book
- Bill’s best-performing emails
- 141  story starter pack ideas
- Video training with Rob Gilbert about storytelling
- 30-minute strategy call with Bill Mueller

### Who is The Story Sales Machine For?

There are many people and products that can benefit from story-based emails and here’s a list that will benefit.

- Digital Products
- ​Coaches & Consultants
- ​Experts
- ​Product Launches
- ​Affiliate Marketing
- ​Sales Funnels
- ​Welcome Sequences
- ​Copywriters
- ​Physical Products
- ​Influencers
- ​And Much More

### Is The Story Sales Machine a SCAM?

The Story Sales Machine is not for everyone especially if you aren’t going to adopt an email marketing strategy.

A scam is when you pay your money and you get nothing in return which is a far cry from what you get with this product.

Email marketing is just another aspect of running an online business and works best when you have a big enough following which takes time.

As you can see, you get a lot of value for the $37 that it will cost you and you are sure to get some benefits.

### What We Like About The Story Sales Machine

We thought the Story Sales Machine was good value for your money

- **Good value for your money:** There are many products on the market that offer similar training but cost a lot more than the $37 that you pay here.

- **Great refund policy:** Something that we haven’t seen before is a full 365-day full refund policy.

What that should tell you is the confidence Bill Mueller has with this course.

- **Good training:** You get what you pay for and whilst it may not be the best email marketing course there is a lot of training that comes with it.

### What We Don’t Like About The Story Sales Machine

- **Not the best training course:** What do you expect for $37 and you are going to need some further training.

### The Story Sales Machine Review – Final Thoughts!

Don’t expect too much with this course but for $37 the email templates alone are going to be worth it.

If you are new to email marketing then you are going to need some further training and there is plenty of good training to be found online.

Email marketing is just one of the many skills that you would need to learn which would give you another passive income stream.

However, if you are thinking of starting an online business then the Story Sales Machine is not going to be of any use to you in the early stages.

You would need to learn the fundamentals of online marketing first because email marketing comes a little later on.

If starting an online business is something that appeals to you then we would recommend a training platform.

That covers everything you’d need to know about creating a successful business online which includes email marketing.

The training platform is extensive and if you are interested then we’d love to share this with you in the next section.

### Something That We Think Might Interest You

After a few years of trying various methods how to make money online, we found [affiliate marketing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Affiliate_marketing) to be the best and easiest business model.

Simply because you don’t need much money to get started, in fact, take a look [here](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/MyAMT) and see what it costs me on a daily basis.

In our opinion, one of the best training platforms online is [Wealthy Affiliate](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/4rnd) and nothing but positive things happen.

It doesn’t cost anything to look and there are no credit card details required.

See for yourself, what have you got to lose?

If it’s not for you then call it a day but you will never know until you have at least taken a look.

[![Get started today and join Wealthy Affiliate for free](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/WANF)

### Story Sales Machine FAQs

1. **Is The Story Sales Machine Worth The Money?**

There are a lot of similar courses out there on the marketplace that cost so much more and usually come with a number of upsells.

There are no upsells with the Story Sales Machine and what you see is what you get, for $37 and we feel you get more than enough for your money.

2. **Is There A Refund Policy In Place?**

There is a refund policy and this is a pretty good one, in fact, one that we haven’t seen before.

Where you have a full year to decide whether the Story Sales Machine is right for you or not.

That’s confidence enough to tell us that what you are getting is a worthwhile product.

3. **Is Bill Mueller A Creditable Person?**

There isn’t a great deal about Bill either on a positive or negative level which is neither good nor bad.

We did find a YouTube channel but there weren’t any videos and there is a Facebook page but no entries for over a year.

We did find a YouTube video where he discusses storytelling which we have added earlier within this review.

4. **Is There Any Additional Training Regarding Email Marketing?**

Email marketing is a massive subject in its own right and is all about instilling confidence in your subscribers.

This can take time and more than often people will subscribe for all sorts of reasons but very quickly forget that they have.

That’s why you have to stand out in the crowd.

Udemy has some very good courses that are very reasonably priced whilst Wealthy Affiliate is a great training platform that has everything.

[Check it out and see what you think](https://achievesuccessfromhome.com/WANF).

### Feedback, Comments and Subscribe

Well, guys, we hope that you get some value out of this Story Sales Machine review and that we answered most if not all of your questions.

If there is anything you’d like to add or maybe you have already purchased this product then we’d love to hear about what you thought of it.

Until next time, stay safe
